event_notes:
7:30pm at Puget Power Building auditorium (Bellevue). First meeting under new officers; plan training and events schedule for coming months.

Mar/Apr 1979 meeting minutes (highlights):
- Shift to a modified bimonthly schedule (second Monday), with next meetings in April, June, and August.
- Starting with the 1979-06-11 meeting, location moves to the Greenlake Library basement meeting room.
- Ordered 2 dozen club T-shirts (small/medium) to sell for $4.00 at club events.
- New publicity flier prepared and distributed.
- Training committee reported opportunities to help Scout troops and other youth groups with map-and-compass.
- February training workshops introduced 50+ people; plans made for a May map-and-compass workshop at Discovery Park.
- Secretary role still open; help needed with newsletter and meeting minutes.
- Invitation: 1979-04-09 at Puget Power Building (7pm short map-and-compass course; 7:30pm meeting).
